name: junior associates at law firms processing 5–15 client briefings/month tool
description: For junior associates at law firms processing 5–15 client briefings/month, inefficient formatting causes delays in client communication. We automate the briefing process instead of manual formatting and summarizing of legal research.
target_audience: junior associates at law firms processing 5–15 client briefings/month
problem_solved: inefficient conversion of legal research into client briefings

locked_fields.primary_problem: inefficient conversion of legal research into client briefings
